        .interactive-canvas-stage {
          --interactive-canvas-grid: color-mix(in oklab, var(--border) 52%, transparent);
          --interactive-canvas-guide: color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 42%, transparent);
          --interactive-canvas-highlight: color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 18%, transparent);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object {
          position: absolute;
          display: flex;
          min-width: 0;
          flex-direction: column;
          align-items: flex-start;
          justify-content: center;
          gap: 6px;
          overflow: hidden;
          border: 2px solid var(--border);
          border-radius: 8px;
          padding: 12px 14px;
          text-align: left;
          font: inherit;
          transform-origin: center;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object[data-editable="true"] {
          cursor: inherit;
          touch-action: none;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-stage[data-canvas-select-tool="true"] .interactive-canvas-object[data-editable="true"] {

        }
        .interactive-canvas-object[data-changed="true"] {
          box-shadow: 0 0 0 5px color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 18%, transparent);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object[data-drop-target="true"] {
          outline: 3px solid var(--primary);
          outline-offset: 2px;
          box-shadow: 0 0 0 6px color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 22%, transparent);
        }
        /* Shared z-plumbing for every def-rendered true-outline SVG silhouette
           (polygon shapes, junctions) — infrastructure, not per-shape CSS. */
        .interactive-canvas-true-outline-silhouette {
          z-index: 0;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-stage[data-canvas-hand-tool="true"] .interactive-canvas-object {
          cursor: inherit;
        }
      
        /* W2 — section: tint fill, subtle border (= chip fill), no shadow, no
           button-style chrome; the floating title chip is a separate
           absolutely-positioned child. */
        .interactive-canvas-object-section {
          border-style: solid;
          border-width: 2px;
          border-radius: 8.5px;
          padding: 0;
          box-shadow: none;
          align-items: stretch;
          justify-content: flex-start;
        }
        /* Drop-target state while a drag hovers this section: keep the section's
           2px outline weight (softer than the generic shape drop glow) with a
           faint primary wash so the capture area reads without shouting. */
        .interactive-canvas-object-section[data-drop-target="true"] {
          outline: 2px solid var(--primary);
          outline-offset: 2px;
          box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 16%, transparent);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-section-title-chip {
          position: absolute;
          left: 3px;
          top: 3px;
          height: 27px;
          display: flex;
          align-items: center;
          border-style: solid;
          border-width: 2px;
          border-radius: 6px;
          padding: 0 10px;
          font-size: 16px;
          font-weight: 700;
          transform-origin: top left;
          color: #000000;
          white-space: nowrap;
          overflow: hidden;
        }
        /* Zoomed-out truncation: the chip's max-width caps the scaled chip to
           its section's inner width; the flex-item inner span turns the
           overflow into an ellipsis instead of a mid-letter clip. */
        .interactive-canvas-section-title-chip > span {
          min-width: 0;
          overflow: hidden;
          text-overflow: ellipsis;
          white-space: nowrap;
        }

        /*
         * W2 — sticky is the ONLY object type with a shadow (per spec, every
         * other shape is flat/shadowless). Square corners (STICKY_GEOMETRY.
         * cornerRadiusPx = 0) and the measured down-biased shadow live here;
         * body typography comes from the inset-body text slot.

          justify-content: flex-start;
          border-radius: 0px;
          box-shadow: 0 3px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object-note[data-changed="true"] {
          box-shadow:

        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line {
          display: block;

        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"] {
          position: relative;
          padding-left: 1em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"]::before {
          content: "•";

          left: 0;

        /* W2 — code-block: Dracula theme, mono font, right-aligned line-number gutter. */
        .interactive-canvas-object-code-block {

          justify-content: flex-start;

        .interactive-canvas-code-block-body {

<div class="interactive-canvas-stage" data-canvas-stage="true" style="position:relative;overflow:hidden;width:100%;height:100%;background-image:radial-gradient(circle, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25) 1px, transparent 1px);background-position:0px 0px;background-size:8px 8px;background-color:#F5F5F5;font-family:"Inter", ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, "Segoe UI", sans-serif;user-select:none;-webkit-user-select:none"><style>
        .interactive-canvas-stage {
          --interactive-canvas-grid: color-mix(in oklab, var(--border) 52%, transparent);
          --interactive-canvas-guide: color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 42%, transparent);
          --interactive-canvas-highlight: color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 18%, transparent);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object {
          position: absolute;
          display: flex;
          min-width: 0;
          flex-direction: column;
          align-items: flex-start;
          justify-content: center;
          gap: 6px;
          overflow: hidden;
          border: 2px solid var(--border);
          border-radius: 8px;
          padding: 12px 14px;
          text-align: left;
          font: inherit;
          transform-origin: center;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object[data-editable="true"] {
          cursor: inherit;
          touch-action: none;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-stage[data-canvas-select-tool="true"] .interactive-canvas-object[data-editable="true"] {
          cursor: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D%22http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg%22%20width%3D%2220%22%20height%3D%2220%22%20viewBox%3D%220%200%2018%2018%22%3E%3Cpath%20d%3D%22M3.474%2C2.784L14.897%2C6.958c.481%2C.176%2C.467%2C.861-.021%2C1.018l-5.228%2C1.673-1.673%2C5.228c-.156%2C.488-.842%2C.502-1.018%2C.021L2.784%2C3.474c-.157-.43%2C.26-.847%2C.69-.69Z%22%20fill%3D%22%23111%22%20stroke%3D%22%23fff%22%20stroke-width%3D%221.2%22%20stroke-linejoin%3D%22round%22%2F%3E%3C%2Fsvg%3E") 3 3, default;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object[data-changed="true"] {
          box-shadow: 0 0 0 5px color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 18%, transparent);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object[data-drop-target="true"] {
          outline: 3px solid var(--primary);
          outline-offset: 2px;
          box-shadow: 0 0 0 6px color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 22%, transparent);
        }
        /* Shared z-plumbing for every def-rendered true-outline SVG silhouette
           (polygon shapes, junctions) — infrastructure, not per-shape CSS. */
        .interactive-canvas-true-outline-silhouette {
          z-index: 0;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-stage[data-canvas-hand-tool="true"] .interactive-canvas-object {
          cursor: inherit;
        }
      
        /* W2 — section: tint fill, subtle border (= chip fill), no shadow, no
           button-style chrome; the floating title chip is a separate
           absolutely-positioned child. */
        .interactive-canvas-object-section {
          border-style: solid;
          border-width: 2px;
          border-radius: 8.5px;
          padding: 0;
          box-shadow: none;
          align-items: stretch;
          justify-content: flex-start;
        }
        /* Drop-target state while a drag hovers this section: keep the section's
           2px outline weight (softer than the generic shape drop glow) with a
           faint primary wash so the capture area reads without shouting. */
        .interactive-canvas-object-section[data-drop-target="true"] {
          outline: 2px solid var(--primary);
          outline-offset: 2px;
          box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 16%, transparent);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-section-title-chip {
          position: absolute;
          left: 3px;
          top: 3px;
          height: 27px;
          display: flex;
          align-items: center;
          border-style: solid;
          border-width: 2px;
          border-radius: 6px;
          padding: 0 10px;
          font-size: 16px;
          font-weight: 700;
          transform-origin: top left;
          color: #000000;
          white-space: nowrap;
          overflow: hidden;
        }
        /* Zoomed-out truncation: the chip's max-width caps the scaled chip to
           its section's inner width; the flex-item inner span turns the
           overflow into an ellipsis instead of a mid-letter clip. */
        .interactive-canvas-section-title-chip > span {
          min-width: 0;
          overflow: hidden;
          text-overflow: ellipsis;
          white-space: nowrap;
        }

        /*
         * W2 — sticky is the ONLY object type with a shadow (per spec, every
         * other shape is flat/shadowless). Square corners (STICKY_GEOMETRY.
         * cornerRadiusPx = 0) and the measured down-biased shadow live here;
         * body typography comes from the inset-body text slot.
         */
        .interactive-canvas-object-note {
          justify-content: flex-start;
          border-radius: 0px;
          box-shadow: 0 3px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object-note[data-changed="true"] {
          box-shadow:
            0 0 0 5px color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 18%, transparent),
            0 3px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line {
          display: block;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"] {
          position: relative;
          padding-left: 1em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"]::before {
          content: "•";
          position: absolute;
          left: 0;
        }

        /* W2 — code-block: Dracula theme, mono font, right-aligned line-number gutter. */
        .interactive-canvas-object-code-block {
          align-items: stretch;
          justify-content: flex-start;
          background: #282A36 !important;
          border: none;
          border-radius: 10px;
          padding: 25px 16px 16px 0;
          box-shadow: none;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-code-block-body {
          display: flex;
          flex-direction: column;
          width: 100%;
          overflow: hidden;
          font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "SF Mono", Menlo, Consolas, monospace;
          font-size: 13px;
          line-height: 1.5;
          color: #F8F8F2;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-code-block-line {
          display: flex;
          gap: 31px;
          white-space: pre;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-code-block-line-number {

        .interactive-canvas-stage {
          --interactive-canvas-grid: color-mix(in oklab, var(--border) 52%, transparent);
          --interactive-canvas-guide: color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 42%, transparent);
          --interactive-canvas-highlight: color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 18%, transparent);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object {
          position: absolute;
          display: flex;
          min-width: 0;
          flex-direction: column;
          align-items: flex-start;
          justify-content: center;
          gap: 6px;
          overflow: hidden;
          border: 2px solid var(--border);
          border-radius: 8px;
          padding: 12px 14px;
          text-align: left;
          font: inherit;
          transform-origin: center;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object[data-editable="true"] {
          cursor: inherit;
          touch-action: none;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-stage[data-canvas-select-tool="true"] .interactive-canvas-object[data-editable="true"] {
          cursor: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D%22http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg%22%20width%3D%2220%22%20height%3D%2220%22%20viewBox%3D%220%200%2018%2018%22%3E%3Cpath%20d%3D%22M3.474%2C2.784L14.897%2C6.958c.481%2C.176%2C.467%2C.861-.021%2C1.018l-5.228%2C1.673-1.673%2C5.228c-.156%2C.488-.842%2C.502-1.018%2C.021L2.784%2C3.474c-.157-.43%2C.26-.847%2C.69-.69Z%22%20fill%3D%22%23111%22%20stroke%3D%22%23fff%22%20stroke-width%3D%221.2%22%20stroke-linejoin%3D%22round%22%2F%3E%3C%2Fsvg%3E") 3 3, default;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object[data-changed="true"] {
          box-shadow: 0 0 0 5px color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 18%, transparent);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object[data-drop-target="true"] {
          outline: 3px solid var(--primary);
          outline-offset: 2px;
          box-shadow: 0 0 0 6px color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 22%, transparent);
        }
        /* Shared z-plumbing for every def-rendered true-outline SVG silhouette
           (polygon shapes, junctions) — infrastructure, not per-shape CSS. */
        .interactive-canvas-true-outline-silhouette {
          z-index: 0;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-stage[data-canvas-hand-tool="true"] .interactive-canvas-object {
          cursor: inherit;
        }
      
        /* W2 — section: tint fill, subtle border (= chip fill), no shadow, no
           button-style chrome; the floating title chip is a separate
           absolutely-positioned child. */
        .interactive-canvas-object-section {
          border-style: solid;
          border-width: 2px;
          border-radius: 8.5px;
          padding: 0;
          box-shadow: none;
          align-items: stretch;
          justify-content: flex-start;
        }
        /* Drop-target state while a drag hovers this section: keep the section's
           2px outline weight (softer than the generic shape drop glow) with a
           faint primary wash so the capture area reads without shouting. */
        .interactive-canvas-object-section[data-drop-target="true"] {
          outline: 2px solid var(--primary);
          outline-offset: 2px;
          box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 16%, transparent);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-section-title-chip {
          position: absolute;
          left: 3px;
          top: 3px;
          height: 27px;
          display: flex;
          align-items: center;
          border-style: solid;
          border-width: 2px;
          border-radius: 6px;
          padding: 0 10px;
          font-size: 16px;
          font-weight: 700;
          transform-origin: top left;
          color: #000000;
          white-space: nowrap;
          overflow: hidden;
        }
        /* Zoomed-out truncation: the chip's max-width caps the scaled chip to
           its section's inner width; the flex-item inner span turns the
           overflow into an ellipsis instead of a mid-letter clip. */
        .interactive-canvas-section-title-chip > span {
          min-width: 0;
          overflow: hidden;
          text-overflow: ellipsis;
          white-space: nowrap;
        }

        /*
         * W2 — sticky is the ONLY object type with a shadow (per spec, every
         * other shape is flat/shadowless). Square corners (STICKY_GEOMETRY.
         * cornerRadiusPx = 0) and the measured down-biased shadow live here;
         * body typography comes from the inset-body text slot.
         */
        .interactive-canvas-object-note {
          justify-content: flex-start;
          border-radius: 0px;
          box-shadow: 0 3px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object-note[data-changed="true"] {
          box-shadow:

            0 3px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);

        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line {
          display: block;

        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"] {
          position: relative;
          padding-left: 1em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"]::before {
          content: "•";
          position: absolute;
          left: 0;
        }

        /* W2 — code-block: Dracula theme, mono font, right-aligned line-number gutter. */
        .interactive-canvas-object-code-block {

        .interactive-canvas-code-block-body {

        .interactive-canvas-stage {
          --interactive-canvas-grid: color-mix(in oklab, var(--border) 52%, transparent);
          --interactive-canvas-guide: color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 42%, transparent);
          --interactive-canvas-highlight: color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 18%, transparent);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object {
          position: absolute;
          display: flex;
          min-width: 0;
          flex-direction: column;
          align-items: flex-start;
          justify-content: center;
          gap: 6px;
          overflow: hidden;
          border: 2px solid var(--border);
          border-radius: 8px;
          padding: 12px 14px;
          text-align: left;
          font: inherit;
          transform-origin: center;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object[data-editable="true"] {
          cursor: inherit;
          touch-action: none;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-stage[data-canvas-select-tool="true"] .interactive-canvas-object[data-editable="true"] {
          cursor: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D%22http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg%22%20width%3D%2220%22%20height%3D%2220%22%20viewBox%3D%220%200%2018%2018%22%3E%3Cpath%20d%3D%22M3.474%2C2.784L14.897%2C6.958c.481%2C.176%2C.467%2C.861-.021%2C1.018l-5.228%2C1.673-1.673%2C5.228c-.156%2C.488-.842%2C.502-1.018%2C.021L2.784%2C3.474c-.157-.43%2C.26-.847%2C.69-.69Z%22%20fill%3D%22%23111%22%20stroke%3D%22%23fff%22%20stroke-width%3D%221.2%22%20stroke-linejoin%3D%22round%22%2F%3E%3C%2Fsvg%3E") 3 3, default;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object[data-changed="true"] {
          box-shadow: 0 0 0 5px color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 18%, transparent);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object[data-drop-target="true"] {
          outline: 3px solid var(--primary);
          outline-offset: 2px;
          box-shadow: 0 0 0 6px color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 22%, transparent);
        }
        /* Shared z-plumbing for every def-rendered true-outline SVG silhouette
           (polygon shapes, junctions) — infrastructure, not per-shape CSS. */
        .interactive-canvas-true-outline-silhouette {
          z-index: 0;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-stage[data-canvas-hand-tool="true"] .interactive-canvas-object {
          cursor: inherit;
        }
      
        /* W2 — section: tint fill, subtle border (= chip fill), no shadow, no
           button-style chrome; the floating title chip is a separate
           absolutely-positioned child. */
        .interactive-canvas-object-section {
          border-style: solid;
          border-width: 2px;
          border-radius: 8.5px;
          padding: 0;
          box-shadow: none;
          align-items: stretch;
          justify-content: flex-start;
        }
        /* Drop-target state while a drag hovers this section: keep the section's
           2px outline weight (softer than the generic shape drop glow) with a
           faint primary wash so the capture area reads without shouting. */
        .interactive-canvas-object-section[data-drop-target="true"] {
          outline: 2px solid var(--primary);
          outline-offset: 2px;
          box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 16%, transparent);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-section-title-chip {
          position: absolute;
          left: 3px;
          top: 3px;
          height: 27px;
          display: flex;
          align-items: center;
          border-style: solid;
          border-width: 2px;
          border-radius: 6px;
          padding: 0 10px;
          font-size: 16px;
          font-weight: 700;
          transform-origin: top left;
          color: #000000;
          white-space: nowrap;
          overflow: hidden;
        }
        /* Zoomed-out truncation: the chip's max-width caps the scaled chip to
           its section's inner width; the flex-item inner span turns the
           overflow into an ellipsis instead of a mid-letter clip. */
        .interactive-canvas-section-title-chip > span {
          min-width: 0;
          overflow: hidden;
          text-overflow: ellipsis;
          white-space: nowrap;
        }

        /*
         * W2 — sticky is the ONLY object type with a shadow (per spec, every
         * other shape is flat/shadowless). Square corners (STICKY_GEOMETRY.
         * cornerRadiusPx = 0) and the measured down-biased shadow live here;
         * body typography comes from the inset-body text slot.

        .interactive-canvas-object-note {

          border-radius: 0px;
          box-shadow: 0 3px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object-note[data-changed="true"] {
          box-shadow:

        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line {

        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"]::before {
          content: "•";
          position: absolute;
          left: 0;
        }

        /* W2 — code-block: Dracula theme, mono font, right-aligned line-number gutter. */
        .interactive-canvas-object-code-block {

<div class="interactive-canvas-stage" data-canvas-stage="true" style="position:relative;overflow:hidden;width:100%;height:100%;background-image:radial-gradient(circle, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25) 1px, transparent 1px);background-position:0px 0px;background-size:8px 8px;background-color:#F5F5F5;font-family:"Inter", ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, "Segoe UI", sans-serif;user-select:none;-webkit-user-select:none"><style>
        .interactive-canvas-stage {
          --interactive-canvas-grid: color-mix(in oklab, var(--border) 52%, transparent);
          --interactive-canvas-guide: color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 42%, transparent);
          --interactive-canvas-highlight: color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 18%, transparent);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object {
          position: absolute;
          display: flex;
          min-width: 0;
          flex-direction: column;
          align-items: flex-start;
          justify-content: center;
          gap: 6px;
          overflow: hidden;
          border: 2px solid var(--border);
          border-radius: 8px;
          padding: 12px 14px;
          text-align: left;
          font: inherit;
          transform-origin: center;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object[data-editable="true"] {
          cursor: inherit;
          touch-action: none;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-stage[data-canvas-select-tool="true"] .interactive-canvas-object[data-editable="true"] {
          cursor: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D%22http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg%22%20width%3D%2220%22%20height%3D%2220%22%20viewBox%3D%220%200%2018%2018%22%3E%3Cpath%20d%3D%22M3.474%2C2.784L14.897%2C6.958c.481%2C.176%2C.467%2C.861-.021%2C1.018l-5.228%2C1.673-1.673%2C5.228c-.156%2C.488-.842%2C.502-1.018%2C.021L2.784%2C3.474c-.157-.43%2C.26-.847%2C.69-.69Z%22%20fill%3D%22%23111%22%20stroke%3D%22%23fff%22%20stroke-width%3D%221.2%22%20stroke-linejoin%3D%22round%22%2F%3E%3C%2Fsvg%3E") 3 3, default;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object[data-changed="true"] {
          box-shadow: 0 0 0 5px color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 18%, transparent);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object[data-drop-target="true"] {
          outline: 3px solid var(--primary);
          outline-offset: 2px;
          box-shadow: 0 0 0 6px color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 22%, transparent);
        }
        /* Shared z-plumbing for every def-rendered true-outline SVG silhouette
           (polygon shapes, junctions) — infrastructure, not per-shape CSS. */
        .interactive-canvas-true-outline-silhouette {
          z-index: 0;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-stage[data-canvas-hand-tool="true"] .interactive-canvas-object {
          cursor: inherit;
        }
      
        /* W2 — section: tint fill, subtle border (= chip fill), no shadow, no
           button-style chrome; the floating title chip is a separate
           absolutely-positioned child. */
        .interactive-canvas-object-section {
          border-style: solid;
          border-width: 2px;
          border-radius: 8.5px;
          padding: 0;
          box-shadow: none;
          align-items: stretch;
          justify-content: flex-start;
        }
        /* Drop-target state while a drag hovers this section: keep the section's
           2px outline weight (softer than the generic shape drop glow) with a
           faint primary wash so the capture area reads without shouting. */
        .interactive-canvas-object-section[data-drop-target="true"] {
          outline: 2px solid var(--primary);
          outline-offset: 2px;
          box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 16%, transparent);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-section-title-chip {
          position: absolute;
          left: 3px;
          top: 3px;
          height: 27px;
          display: flex;
          align-items: center;
          border-style: solid;
          border-width: 2px;
          border-radius: 6px;
          padding: 0 10px;
          font-size: 16px;
          font-weight: 700;
          transform-origin: top left;
          color: #000000;
          white-space: nowrap;
          overflow: hidden;
        }
        /* Zoomed-out truncation: the chip's max-width caps the scaled chip to
           its section's inner width; the flex-item inner span turns the
           overflow into an ellipsis instead of a mid-letter clip. */
        .interactive-canvas-section-title-chip > span {
          min-width: 0;
          overflow: hidden;
          text-overflow: ellipsis;
          white-space: nowrap;
        }

        /*
         * W2 — sticky is the ONLY object type with a shadow (per spec, every
         * other shape is flat/shadowless). Square corners (STICKY_GEOMETRY.
         * cornerRadiusPx = 0) and the measured down-biased shadow live here;
         * body typography comes from the inset-body text slot.
         */
        .interactive-canvas-object-note {
          justify-content: flex-start;
          border-radius: 0px;
          box-shadow: 0 3px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object-note[data-changed="true"] {
          box-shadow:
            0 0 0 5px color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 18%, transparent),
            0 3px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line {
          display: block;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"] {
          position: relative;
          padding-left: 1em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"]::before {
          content: "•";
          position: absolute;
          left: 0;
        }

        /* W2 — code-block: Dracula theme, mono font, right-aligned line-number gutter. */
        .interactive-canvas-object-code-block {
          align-items: stretch;
          justify-content: flex-start;
          background: #282A36 !important;
          border: none;
          border-radius: 10px;
          padding: 25px 16px 16px 0;
          box-shadow: none;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-code-block-body {
          display: flex;

        .interactive-canvas-stage {
          --interactive-canvas-grid: color-mix(in oklab, var(--border) 52%, transparent);
          --interactive-canvas-guide: color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 42%, transparent);
          --interactive-canvas-highlight: color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 18%, transparent);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object {
          position: absolute;
          display: flex;
          min-width: 0;
          flex-direction: column;
          align-items: flex-start;
          justify-content: center;
          gap: 6px;
          overflow: hidden;
          border: 2px solid var(--border);
          border-radius: 8px;
          padding: 12px 14px;
          text-align: left;
          font: inherit;
          transform-origin: center;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object[data-editable="true"] {
          cursor: inherit;
          touch-action: none;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-stage[data-canvas-select-tool="true"] .interactive-canvas-object[data-editable="true"] {
          cursor: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D%22http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg%22%20width%3D%2220%22%20height%3D%2220%22%20viewBox%3D%220%200%2018%2018%22%3E%3Cpath%20d%3D%22M3.474%2C2.784L14.897%2C6.958c.481%2C.176%2C.467%2C.861-.021%2C1.018l-5.228%2C1.673-1.673%2C5.228c-.156%2C.488-.842%2C.502-1.018%2C.021L2.784%2C3.474c-.157-.43%2C.26-.847%2C.69-.69Z%22%20fill%3D%22%23111%22%20stroke%3D%22%23fff%22%20stroke-width%3D%221.2%22%20stroke-linejoin%3D%22round%22%2F%3E%3C%2Fsvg%3E") 3 3, default;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object[data-changed="true"] {
          box-shadow: 0 0 0 5px color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 18%, transparent);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object[data-drop-target="true"] {
          outline: 3px solid var(--primary);
          outline-offset: 2px;
          box-shadow: 0 0 0 6px color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 22%, transparent);
        }
        /* Shared z-plumbing for every def-rendered true-outline SVG silhouette
           (polygon shapes, junctions) — infrastructure, not per-shape CSS. */
        .interactive-canvas-true-outline-silhouette {
          z-index: 0;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-stage[data-canvas-hand-tool="true"] .interactive-canvas-object {
          cursor: inherit;
        }
      
        /* W2 — section: tint fill, subtle border (= chip fill), no shadow, no
           button-style chrome; the floating title chip is a separate
           absolutely-positioned child. */
        .interactive-canvas-object-section {
          border-style: solid;
          border-width: 2px;
          border-radius: 8.5px;
          padding: 0;
          box-shadow: none;
          align-items: stretch;
          justify-content: flex-start;
        }
        /* Drop-target state while a drag hovers this section: keep the section's
           2px outline weight (softer than the generic shape drop glow) with a
           faint primary wash so the capture area reads without shouting. */
        .interactive-canvas-object-section[data-drop-target="true"] {
          outline: 2px solid var(--primary);
          outline-offset: 2px;
          box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 16%, transparent);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-section-title-chip {
          position: absolute;
          left: 3px;
          top: 3px;
          height: 27px;
          display: flex;
          align-items: center;
          border-style: solid;
          border-width: 2px;
          border-radius: 6px;
          padding: 0 10px;
          font-size: 16px;
          font-weight: 700;
          transform-origin: top left;
          color: #000000;
          white-space: nowrap;
          overflow: hidden;
        }
        /* Zoomed-out truncation: the chip's max-width caps the scaled chip to
           its section's inner width; the flex-item inner span turns the
           overflow into an ellipsis instead of a mid-letter clip. */
        .interactive-canvas-section-title-chip > span {
          min-width: 0;
          overflow: hidden;
          text-overflow: ellipsis;
          white-space: nowrap;
        }

        /*
         * W2 — sticky is the ONLY object type with a shadow (per spec, every
         * other shape is flat/shadowless). Square corners (STICKY_GEOMETRY.
         * cornerRadiusPx = 0) and the measured down-biased shadow live here;
         * body typography comes from the inset-body text slot.
         */
        .interactive-canvas-object-note {
          justify-content: flex-start;
          border-radius: 0px;
          box-shadow: 0 3px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object-note[data-changed="true"] {
          box-shadow:
            0 0 0 5px color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 18%, transparent),
            0 3px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line {
          display: block;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"] {
          position: relative;
          padding-left: 1em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"]::before {
          content: "•";
          position: absolute;
          left: 0;
        }

        /* W2 — code-block: Dracula theme, mono font, right-aligned line-number gutter. */
        .interactive-canvas-object-code-block {
          align-items: stretch;
          justify-content: flex-start;
          background: #282A36 !important;
          border: none;
          border-radius: 10px;
          padding: 25px 16px 16px 0;
          box-shadow: none;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-code-block-body {
          display: flex;

        }

        .interactive-canvas-code-block-line-number {

        .interactive-canvas-object-ellipse {

        }

        .interactive-canvas-object-database {

        .interactive-canvas-stage {
          --interactive-canvas-grid: color-mix(in oklab, var(--border) 52%, transparent);
          --interactive-canvas-guide: color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 42%, transparent);
          --interactive-canvas-highlight: color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 18%, transparent);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object {
          position: absolute;
          display: flex;
          min-width: 0;
          flex-direction: column;
          align-items: flex-start;
          justify-content: center;
          gap: 6px;
          overflow: hidden;
          border: 2px solid var(--border);
          border-radius: 8px;
          padding: 12px 14px;
          text-align: left;
          font: inherit;
          transform-origin: center;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object[data-editable="true"] {
          cursor: inherit;
          touch-action: none;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-stage[data-canvas-select-tool="true"] .interactive-canvas-object[data-editable="true"] {
          cursor: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D%22http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg%22%20width%3D%2220%22%20height%3D%2220%22%20viewBox%3D%220%200%2018%2018%22%3E%3Cpath%20d%3D%22M3.474%2C2.784L14.897%2C6.958c.481%2C.176%2C.467%2C.861-.021%2C1.018l-5.228%2C1.673-1.673%2C5.228c-.156%2C.488-.842%2C.502-1.018%2C.021L2.784%2C3.474c-.157-.43%2C.26-.847%2C.69-.69Z%22%20fill%3D%22%23111%22%20stroke%3D%22%23fff%22%20stroke-width%3D%221.2%22%20stroke-linejoin%3D%22round%22%2F%3E%3C%2Fsvg%3E") 3 3, default;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object[data-changed="true"] {
          box-shadow: 0 0 0 5px color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 18%, transparent);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object[data-drop-target="true"] {
          outline: 3px solid var(--primary);
          outline-offset: 2px;
          box-shadow: 0 0 0 6px color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 22%, transparent);
        }
        /* Shared z-plumbing for every def-rendered true-outline SVG silhouette

        .interactive-canvas-true-outline-silhouette {
          z-index: 0;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-stage[data-canvas-hand-tool="true"] .interactive-canvas-object {
          cursor: inherit;
        }
      
        /* W2 — section: tint fill, subtle border (= chip fill), no shadow, no
           button-style chrome; the floating title chip is a separate
           absolutely-positioned child. */
        .interactive-canvas-object-section {
          border-style: solid;
          border-width: 2px;
          border-radius: 8.5px;
          padding: 0;
          box-shadow: none;
          align-items: stretch;
          justify-content: flex-start;
        }
        /* Drop-target state while a drag hovers this section: keep the section's
           2px outline weight (softer than the generic shape drop glow) with a
           faint primary wash so the capture area reads without shouting. */
        .interactive-canvas-object-section[data-drop-target="true"] {
          outline: 2px solid var(--primary);
          outline-offset: 2px;
          box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 16%, transparent);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-section-title-chip {
          position: absolute;
          left: 3px;
          top: 3px;
          height: 27px;
          display: flex;
          align-items: center;
          border-style: solid;
          border-width: 2px;
          border-radius: 6px;
          padding: 0 10px;
          font-size: 16px;
          font-weight: 700;
          transform-origin: top left;
          color: #000000;
          white-space: nowrap;
          overflow: hidden;
        }
        /* Zoomed-out truncation: the chip's max-width caps the scaled chip to
           its section's inner width; the flex-item inner span turns the
           overflow into an ellipsis instead of a mid-letter clip. */
        .interactive-canvas-section-title-chip > span {
          min-width: 0;
          overflow: hidden;
          text-overflow: ellipsis;
          white-space: nowrap;
        }

        /*
         * W2 — sticky is the ONLY object type with a shadow (per spec, every
         * other shape is flat/shadowless). Square corners (STICKY_GEOMETRY.
